completed_tasks.name: Domain grilling session (40+ questions, all resolved)
Obsidian notes: Domain Model, Milestones, Architecture, Agent Types, Pipeline, Tech Stack

remaining_tasks.name: Implement GitHub Issue #1: scaffold + JWT auth
Implement GitHub Issue #2: Watchlist + AlertRule CRUD

decisions.decision: ResearchMemo lifecycle: PENDING → RUNNING → COMPLETE | PARTIAL | FAILED
decisions.rationale: PARTIAL = memo exists but with gaps (some agents failed); FAILED = no usable memo
Only agent with full cross-agent visibility
Deterministic dispatch; LLM routing adds latency and failure surface for no benefit at this scale

decisions.decision: ClarificationResponse is not persisted; no ResearchMemo created until disambiguation resolved
decisions.rationale: Avoids orphaned memos in PENDING state

decisions.decision: Section strings are plain string convention in ingestion layer; constants live in app/ingestion/section_constants.py only
decisions.rationale: Prevents inline literals from drifting across codebase

decisions.decision: All Groq API calls go through a shared async rate limiter
decisions.rationale: Groq free tier: ~6000 tokens/min; direct calls will 429 under parallel agent execution

decisions.decision: EDGAR client must include User-Agent: Vantage/1.0 vishwak.vel@gmail.com on every request
decisions.rationale: EDGAR API policy; requests without User-Agent are blocked

decisions.decision: FinancialMetric is a first-class persisted table with upsert key (ticker, metric_name, period)
decisions.rationale: Required for isolation forest anomaly detection; can't run on raw AgentOutput fields

decisions.decision: Single Chroma collection (not per-ticker or per-user)
decisions.rationale: Metadata filtering handles scoping; multiple collections add operational complexity for no retrieval benefit at this scale

decisions.decision: RAGAS evaluation is offline-only (Celery beat job)
decisions.rationale: Per-memo online eval would add latency; offline golden set is sufficient for retrieval quality signal

decisions.decision: Sessions ground follow-ups on memo text, no RAG re-query
decisions.rationale: Follow-ups are about the memo, not new research; re-querying would pollute context

next_action: Create feature branch feat/scaffold-jwt-auth and implement GitHub Issue #1: project foundation, Docker compose, JWT auth
context_notes: Full pre-implementation planning complete. All domain decisions resolved. 17 GitHub issues published with ready-for-agent label and correct dependency ordering. Issues #1 and #2 are unblocked and can start in parallel. The session protocol requires starting implementation with a feature branch (never commit to main directly). Milestone 1 day-one non-negotiables: Company table, Groq rate limiter, EDGAR User-Agent. Read CLAUDE.md and CONTEXT.md before starting any implementation.
